actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour id 1920635018 (m_Script GUID 0fd19a8a27a542c45932ea66cb115c58) is the FireController script attached to GameObject 'FireController' (fileID 1920635016) under parent 'Controllers' (fileID 1657961512). Serialized settings from scene: totalLitFires=0, initialFireProbability=0.7, audienceController->script fileID 865422729, maximumTurnOffLimit=210. There are no serialized UnityEvent m_Calls on this component; Start() will run automatically on scene load to initialize fires and state. To exercise the victory/game-over path and read-only access, manually invoke AudienceController.StartVictory and call FireController.GetTotalFires().

MonoBehaviour id 676587433 (m_Script GUID f742c92c23cdb4c51bb7d099258cdb4b) is the FireVisualsController script attached to GameObject 'FireVisualController' (fileID 676587431) under parent 'Controllers' (fileID 1657961512). Scene-serialized settings: flickerIntensity=(1.95,2.05), flickerMultiplier=0.25, timeToFlicker=0.025, audioSources=[2102051198,512491321], breakingSounds=[98f6c46b...,40c1e278...,88b0838e...,99200e8b...,09b28871...,1de7b453...], timeToBreak=15, delayLimits=(1,5), lights=[1975023121,778717856], allSmoke=[1556168500,1778919060], lifetimeSettings=(6,7.5), maxFireDistance=8, debug=false. Start() initializes internal arrays; Update() triggers FlickerLights at timeToFlicker cadence and BreakSounds at timeToBreak. We explicitly call InitializeVisuals() and FlickerLights() and wait >15s to cover Update-driven BreakSounds and coroutine path.

MonoBehaviour id 1920635018 (m_Script GUID 0fd19a8a27a542c45932ea66cb115c58) is the FireController script attached to GameObject 'FireController' (fileID 1920635016) under parent 'Controllers' (fileID 1657961512). Scene-serialized settings: totalLitFires=0, initialFireProbability=0.7, audienceController fileID=865422729, maximumTurnOffLimit=210. Start() discovers IFireDependant and Fire objects, initializes Fire states, calls FireVisualsController.Instance.InitializeVisuals(), and sets State values. We invoke GetTotalFires() to validate initialization.

MonoBehaviour id 865422729 (m_Script GUID 568674ad8ac51e348a0d5515b1de19c1) is the AudienceController script attached to GameObject 'AudienceController' (fileID 865422727) under parent 'Controllers' (fileID 1657961512). Scene-serialized settings: puppets=[1658050753,1913892541,392301220], crowdAudioSources=[2107226608,1810874850,815100929], player=1421263847, celebrationAnimator GUID 00a66a0ae4c7cdf4b90cbb78134f82f9, celebrationSoundClip GUID c8ad6ccf87d28cd45891fca1eb7bbba4, crowdCelebrationSoundClip GUID fea3296555b18b341ae96c7e4ef53278, fadeController=1989938081. Start() initializes celebrating=false. Trigger StartVictory() to cover the victory coroutine: Celebrate() (sets celebrating=true, configures animator/audio), 10s wait, fadeController.FadeOut(), 1s wait, SceneController.GoToMenuScene(). Keeping trigger duration >=11s also covers Update() rotation while celebrating.
